mapper.select:
SELECT * FROM `sys_user`
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryDTO.userName}, '%') AND email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryDTO.email}, '%') AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryDTO.phone}, '%') AND nickName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryDTO.nickName}, '%')
ORDER BY id DESC
LIMIT #{pageSize} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COUNT(*) FROM `sys_user`
AND name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryDTO.userName}, '%') AND email LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryDTO.email}, '%') AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryDTO.phone}, '%') AND nickName LIKE CONCAT('%', #{queryDTO.nickName}, '%')
